_note: Sanitized handoff from ADR cloud-unattended-sre.md. Fixed schema · allowlist · no raw logs/secrets. Only input generated by observation stage (read-only) and passed to fix identity (no AWS read). Actual values are placeholders.

incident.evidence: Upstream readings response failed contract validation (zReadingsResponse). kind=upstream and small duration = not timeout but contract/body mismatch. Observed payload structure (keys only, values omitted) is { data: { readings: [ ... ] } }, contract expects { readings: [ ... ] }. Suspected upstream drift to wrap with data.

constraints.scope: Minimal fixes only. Do not perform unrelated refactoring.
constraints.fixer_inputs: Only repo + this triage. No AWS / network egress.
